description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the fedora:latest Docker image and applies a global before_script running `su`, `yum install -y sudo`, `ls`, and `./common.sh` for every job. Define three jobs—docker, vagrant, and virtualbox—each placed in the default stage (test) and each executing its own script file. The docker job runs `./docker.sh`, the vagrant job runs `./vagrant.sh`, and the virtualbox job runs `./VirtualBoxInstall.sh`. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, variables, services, or conditional rules.
